MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: Sajja Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Plaintiff: James Bostwick present with counsel, M. Armon Cooper.
Plaintiff was sworn and examined.
The Court hears evidence and grants default judgment as follows:
No money judgment awarded.
Costs in the amount of $395.00
Declaratory relief granted as to the attachment 7 of the proposed judgment, see scanned document. Judgment signed in open court.
